svg.metadata: {"schema_version":1,"id":"31_left_near_and_far","label":"Same-side double: near-left and far-left","topology":"Composite of 06_near_exit_left:L0, 11_far_exit_left:L2 over 01_straight.","sockets":["B0","T0","L0","L2"],"socket_contract":{"B0":{"edge":"bottom","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.16},"T0":{"edge":"top","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.035},"L0":{"edge":"left","center":0.56,"direction":"horizontal","road_width":0.028},"L2":{"edge":"left","center":0.375,"direction":"horizontal","road_width":0.016}}}
